raw_consumer_statement:
Ordered a product costing approx. {$48000.00}, the product did not work upon receiving it. The company ( XXXX ) agreed to refund all monies. It has been 30 days without receiving a refund, or even a credit to my account, not even an update, while waiting. Called American Express 7 times, and the merchant and I are being XXXX around. If you please look into this case, they are purposely giving us the run-around to hold this large amount of money. Even telling the merchant that they can not do anything, as it is labeled a " XXXX XXXX XXXX. '' However, when I called to ask about this, they said no, it's listed as a dispute. I am a XXXX with a XXXX, and they are taking advantage of me, sending me in circles. When asked who I can call to get this resolved, they said " they, nor I, will be given access to that information. '' I recorded this conversation. Please help, this is a lot of money, and I did everything they asked of me, as did the merchant, but they keep moving the goalpost. They also keep moving the date they will refund it without notification or reason. 
Dispute filed XX/XX/year> by me, called 7 times. 
Merchant began calling them shortly thereafter.
